generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from hoist encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements for crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for trajectory generation calculations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model for crane movement validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage and querying"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization platform for real-time dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for message queuing between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for trajectory generation and simulation logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for 3D crane design"
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical sensor data to TimescaleDB for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane trajectories using Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryTraceVisualization
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated and actual trajectories for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationBreachNotification
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model for container movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for trajectory testing and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for analysis and trend identification"
]

instance TrajectoryTraceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds for decision making"
]

instance ValidationBreachNotification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator notification triggered by continuous validation breaches for maintenance or adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated optimal trajectory for container movement"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results used for trajectory validation and testing"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling horizontal cart movement on gantry crane"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling vertical hoist movement on gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup at hoist end"
]

instance Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin architecture for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains TimescaleDBContainer, GrafanaDashboardContainer, TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer, SimulationServiceContainer, ContinuousValidationServiceContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance TimescaleDBContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for TimescaleDB time-series database"
]

instance GrafanaDashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for Grafana visualization dashboard"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for trajectory generation service"
]

instance SimulationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for crane dynamics simulation service"
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for continuous validation service"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Docker container for Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application are sent through the Physical Crane Interface to adjust motor movements and electromagnet operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with the Continuous Validation Service comparing executed trajectories against simulations at operational speeds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical components (crane frame, motors, controllers, sensors) interact with digital containers (database, dashboard, services) via MQTT, deployed on a single PC using Docker for service orchestration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), with the DT monitoring and controlling the physical crane during active use for validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and actual trajectory data, comparing against predefined thresholds to detect discrepancies and notify operators."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical Crane Interface connects to crane controllers via proprietary protocols (not specified); digital twin services communicate via Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana; Python services bundled in gantrylib module; deployed on a personal computer via docker compose."
]
